prompt: I'm migrating the Jetcaster KMP project to AGP 9.0. It currently uses AGP 8.11.1. The mobile module uses kotlin.android which is now built-in to AGP 9.0. It also has kotlinOptions that needs migration to compilerOptions. Please analyze the project and perform the full migration.
source: Jetcaster — already uses com.android.kotlin.multiplatform.library; mobile has kotlin.android + kotlinOptions needing migration
agent_rubric: The sharedUi module's android config remains inside kotlin { androidLibrary { } } (not moved to top level)
The mobile module's org.jetbrains.kotlin.android plugin is removed (AGP 9 built-in Kotlin)
The mobile module's kotlinOptions {} block is migrated to kotlin { compilerOptions {} }
KSP plugin compatibility with AGP 9 is maintained
AGP version in gradle/libs.versions.toml is updated to 9.0.0 or higher
Gradle wrapper in gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties is updated to 9.1.0 or higher
No removed gradle properties are present in gradle.properties (android.enableLegacyVariantApi, android.r8.integratedResourceShrinking, android.enableNewResourceShrinker.preciseShrinking)
The migration does not break the existing dependency structure between modules
